title: Lace extension config defaults (.config)
description: TOML structure for extension config files. Each extension may ship a `{extName}.config` alongside its `.laceext` file, declaring default values for config fields accessible via the `config` base in rule bodies. See lace-extensions.md §2.3.

name.description: Extension name — must match the `[extension].name` in the corresponding `.laceext` file.

version.description: Extension version — must match the `[extension].version` in the corresponding `.laceext` file.

config.description: Default values for extension config fields. Keys are field names accessible via `config.{key}` in rule bodies. Values may be any TOML-expressible type (string, integer, float, boolean, array, table). Omitted keys default to null when accessed in rule bodies.
